info.title: PoYo AI - Happy Horse 1.1 API
info.description: Happy Horse 1.1 text-to-video, image-to-video, and reference-to-video modes

post.description: Generate video with Alibaba Happy Horse 1.1

input.prompt: Medium shot of a professional news anchor at a sleek desk in a modern broadcast studio, cool blue lighting, softly glowing screens behind. 0-5s: He looks into the camera and says in a clear measured voice, "Good evening. Tonight, a breakthrough that could change how millions of us work." 5-10s: He turns slightly toward a second camera, "We'll have the full story, and what it means for you, right after this." Precise lip-sync, subtle studio room tone, crisp broadcast quality, shallow depth of field.

A bearded man sits in a warm rustic study with brick and wood walls, bookshelves, a glowing table lamp, and a leather chair. He gently strums an acoustic guitar, then looks up toward the camera and starts singing with natural lip-sync. The camera slowly pushes in, keeping the cozy room light and shallow depth of field. Audio: soft acoustic guitar, intimate male vocal, quiet room tone.

Ultra-realistic skincare commercial using the four reference images as the exact product identity. Show a frosted glass serum bottle on a clean marble countertop with soft morning light and water droplets. Slow macro push-in, gentle rotation of the bottle, dewy highlights on the label, premium spa atmosphere. Audio: soft water ripple, subtle glass tap, calm luxury ambient music. No people.

BearerAuth.description:
All API endpoints require Bearer Token authentication

Get your API Key:

Visit the [API Key Management Page](https://poyo.ai/dashboard/api-key) to get your API Key

Add it to the request header:

```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
```

callback_url.description: Webhook callback URL for result notifications

prompt.description: Text prompt. Required for text-to-video and reference-to-video. Optional for image-to-video. Maximum length is 2,500 characters.
prompt.example: Medium shot of a professional news anchor at a sleek desk in a modern broadcast studio, cool blue lighting, softly glowing screens behind. Precise lip-sync, subtle studio room tone, crisp broadcast quality, shallow depth of field.

image_urls.description: Single-item first-frame image URL array for image-to-video. Do not combine with reference_image_urls.

reference_image_urls.description: Reference images for reference-to-video. Do not combine with image_urls.

aspect_ratio.description: Output aspect ratio for text-to-video and reference-to-video

duration.description: Output duration in seconds. Credits are calculated by duration and selected resolution.

seed.description: Optional random seed for reproducible generation

enable_safety_checker.description: Enable content moderation for input and output
